variants.name: desktop-chat-dark
variants.description: Rendered React 19 chat surface with the Assistant UI thread/composer/thread-list boundary and KnowMe Flat 2.0 dark theme.

variants.name: ios-home-light
variants.description: Simulator-native capture of the Flutter Home destination after FRB initialization and ordered startup completed.

runs.runtime_detail: Vite/Tauri dev server on localhost with Assistant UI and PGlite runtime mounted.
iPhone 17 simulator, iOS 26.4, Flutter debug build installed and launched through simctl.

notes: Desktop and iOS representative previews rendered successfully.
The complete destination x breakpoint x theme screenshot matrix remains incomplete.
The Rust local-inference live test is blocked by the missing optional Xcode Metal Toolchain component.
